etymology.description: 娄(婁) (lóu, "lou") + 用(用) (yòng, "use") = phonetic component
etymology.interpretation: The character 㚇 (zōng) is primarily used as a phonetic component. It combines 娄(婁) (lóu, "lou"), which provides the phonetic aspect, with 用(用) (yòng, "use") to create the overall character, but not for semantic value. Its usage is predominantly phonetic.
